Package org.rodinp.internal.core.indexer

Class ProjectIndexManager

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.indexer.ProjectIndexManager
public class ProjectIndexManager extends Object
The ProjectIndexManager (PIM) stores and maintains index tables for a single project. TODO instead of synchronizing everything, take a snapshot of the tables before any change, then manage exclusive access to writers, meanwhile read of the snapshot shall be non exclusive. Would prevents blocking while building.

    • fileChanged

      public void fileChanged(IRodinFile file, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor)
      Indicates that the given file has to be (re)-indexed. Also, update the dependents of the given file in the dependency graph.
      Parameters:
      file - the changed file
      monitor - the monitor to manage cancellation with
